tracks.music_generation_prompt: Fast-paced instrumental J-Rock workout anthem, 175 BPM, key of E minor. Driving double-kick drum patterns and galloping heavy distortion bass lines. Shredding electric guitar riffs layered with bright, heroic synth brass and high-energy arpeggios. The arrangement kicks off immediately with a powerful, soaring lead melody in the first 5 seconds to hook the listener. Intensely motivational anime battle vibe, pushing high energy dynamics throughout. Hi-fi modern production quality with a massive stadium rock sound, clean professional mastering, and thick low-end punch designed for heavy lifting and sprinting. Sounds like a commercial release anime opening.

tracks.youtube_description: Channel your inner protagonist with this high-octane anime gym mix! ⚔️ Perfect for hitting PRs, intense cardio, or heavy lifting sessions. Unleash your true power and train like a hero. #AnimeWorkout #GymMusic #WorkoutMotivation #Shonen #JRock
tracks.thumbnail_image_prompt: Cinematic gym photography of a powerful muscular athlete performing a heavy deadlift, waist-up framing. Sweaty workout realism with dramatic rim lighting and glowing red neon accents mimicking anime power auras. Strong central subject with clear focal point, minimal clutter, bold shapes. Shallow depth of field separating the athlete from a dark, atmospheric gym background with subtle light beams. Spacious and layered composition designed for parallax animation, high contrast lighting, modern gym clothing. Visually striking and readable on small mobile screens.

Hi-fi modern production quality, meticulously balanced sidechain, and crystal-clean professional mastering.
